title: Cooked Beetroots
description: normal beetroots sucks right? Taste the Cooked ones!
body:
![Logo](https://i.ibb.co/BVxnrCvg/Cooked-Beetroots.png)

As the name of the mod says this mod adds Cooked Beetroots. Cooked Beetroots are just normal Beetroots but they give a little more hunger bars (in total two instead of one) and more saturation. You can simply cook beetroots in a Furnace, Smoker or on a campfire to obtain the Cooked Beetroots.

That's practically all this mod adds. Have fun.

(if you wish for a port for a specific version that is not released yet, write it in the commentary section and for what _Forge/Fabric/..._)

_(Forge 1.16.5 / 1.17.1 and 1.18.2 are coming soon)_

~Jeremy3463
